blockers.evidence: cosign verify against the immutable upstream index returned no signatures found
release tag 4.39 resolves to an unsigned upstream source commit
the upstream container release workflow disables provenance and has no attestation step
The reviewed source, workflow, contract, and verifier must first merge; only refs/heads/main may publish, sign, and promote the trusted digest.

assessment.rationale: A feature branch may validate the policy but cannot approve its own publisher. The successful bootstrap run is retained as a non-admitted observation; approval requires a fresh main-branch run and an evidence-only follow-up PR.

blockers.evidence: No current release-evidence.json is admitted until the main-only workflow succeeds and its final artifact is reviewed in a follow-up PR.
The parent must add a repository-source-build supply-chain record and prove the proposed SeaweedFS resident-image ledger entry against the admitted main-run evidence.

requirements: merge the main-only no-cache trusted build policy
complete the trusted workflow from refs/heads/main
cryptographically reverify the retained Cosign bundle with pinned Cosign v3.1.1
commit the complete final artifact and approved admission in an evidence-only follow-up PR
keep runtime manifests blocked until parent Issue #26 closes its resident-image contract
